name: methylation_dmr_regions
description: Differential methylated regions (DMR) table to methylation-driven gene programs and GMT gene sets

inputs.name: dmr_tsv
inputs.description: DMR table with genomic intervals and delta methylation

inputs.name: gtf
inputs.description: Gene annotation used for promoter and TSS linkage

inputs.name: region_gene_links_tsv
inputs.description: Optional external region-to-gene links used when link_method includes external

inputs.name: enhancer_bed
inputs.description: Optional enhancer BED for distal enhancer_only mode

parameters.name: dataset_label
parameters.help: Optional dataset label written to metadata and run summary

parameters.name: gtf_source
parameters.help: Optional annotation provenance label for metadata

parameters.name: chrom_column
parameters.help: Chromosome column in dmr_tsv

parameters.name: start_column
parameters.help: Start column in dmr_tsv

parameters.name: end_column
parameters.help: End column in dmr_tsv

parameters.name: delta_column
parameters.help: Delta methylation column

parameters.name: padj_column
parameters.help: Adjusted p-value/FDR column (preferred over pvalue when present)

parameters.name: pvalue_column
parameters.help: P-value column used when padj column is absent

parameters.name: drop_sex_chrom
parameters.help: Drop chrX/chrY features before scoring

parameters.name: score_mode
parameters.help: Feature scoring mode before gene projection

parameters.name: delta_orientation
parameters.help: Interpret delta as activity-oriented (-delta) or raw (+delta)

parameters.name: neglog10p_cap
parameters.help: Maximum -log10(p) multiplier when score_mode uses significance weighting

parameters.name: neglog10p_eps
parameters.help: Lower bound epsilon for p-values in score weighting

parameters.name: score_transform
parameters.help: Transform applied to feature-level scores before gene aggregation

parameters.name: aggregation
parameters.help: Aggregation from linked features to gene score

parameters.name: program_preset
parameters.help: Program preset controlling which program families run

parameters.name: program_methods
parameters.help: Optional comma-separated explicit program methods

parameters.name: link_method
parameters.help: Link method expression (all or comma-separated methods)

parameters.name: promoter_upstream_bp
parameters.help: Promoter window upstream size in base pairs

parameters.name: promoter_downstream_bp
parameters.help: Promoter window downstream size in base pairs

parameters.name: max_distance_bp
parameters.help: Maximum distance for nearest_tss and distance_decay

parameters.name: decay_length_bp
parameters.help: Decay length for distance_decay linking

parameters.name: max_genes_per_peak
parameters.help: Maximum linked genes retained per feature for distance_decay

parameters.name: distal_mode
parameters.help: Distal masking strategy

parameters.name: enhancer_resource_id
parameters.help: Resource id for enhancer BED used when distal_mode=enhancer_only

parameters.name: exclude_gene_symbol_regex
parameters.help: Repeatable regex filter for gene_symbol/gene_id exclusion before selection and GMT

parameters.name: exclude_gene_symbols_tsv
parameters.help: Optional one-symbol-per-line exclusion list

parameters.name: select
parameters.help: Gene selection method

parameters.name: top_k
parameters.help: Top-K selected genes

parameters.name: quantile
parameters.help: Top quantile fraction for quantile selection

parameters.name: min_score
parameters.help: Minimum score threshold for threshold selection

parameters.name: normalize
parameters.help: Selected-set weight normalization

parameters.name: emit_full
parameters.help: Write geneset.full.tsv containing full scores

parameters.name: emit_gmt
parameters.help: Write genesets.gmt

parameters.name: gmt_out
parameters.help: Optional GMT output path (relative to out_dir unless absolute)

parameters.name: gmt_prefer_symbol
parameters.help: Prefer gene_symbol over gene_id when available

parameters.name: gmt_require_symbol
parameters.help: Require gene_symbol token presence for GMT inclusion

parameters.name: gmt_biotype_allowlist
parameters.help: Optional comma-separated gene_biotype allowlist

parameters.name: gmt_min_genes
parameters.help: Minimum genes per GMT set

parameters.name: gmt_max_genes
parameters.help: Maximum genes per GMT set

parameters.name: gmt_topk_list
parameters.help: Comma-separated top-k GMT plans

parameters.name: gmt_mass_list
parameters.help: Comma-separated mass-target GMT plans in (0,1)

parameters.name: gmt_split_signed
parameters.help: Emit signed split GMT sets (__pos and __neg)

parameters.name: emit_small_gene_sets
parameters.help: Allow GMT outputs below gmt_min_genes

parameters.name: resources_manifest
parameters.help: Optional resource manifest path

parameters.name: resources_dir
parameters.help: Optional resources directory root

parameters.name: resource_policy
parameters.help: Behavior when requested resource-backed inputs are unavailable
